name: Qualtrics International Inc.
description: Qualtrics International Inc. is a leading technology company that provides an experience management (XM) platform designed to help organizations manage and improve their customer, employee, product, and brand experiences. Founded in 2002 and headquartered in Provo, Utah, the company offers a comprehensive software suite that captures, analyzes, and acts on experience data. By unifying signals from various touchpoints into a single AI-powered system, Qualtrics enables businesses to close experience gaps, build customer loyalty, and enhance employee engagement, serving thousands of global clients, including a significant portion of the Fortune 100.
